name: io.github.thenexusintel/nexus-mcp
description: U.S. government primary-source records (courts, SEC/EDGAR, OFAC, FEC, lobbying, DOJ, FDA), fact-checks with citations, news search, and corruption/fraud/PRC trackers — for AI agents.

environmentVariables.name: NEXUS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your free Nexus API key from https://thenexus.news/developers

environmentVariables.name: NEXUS_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: API base URL (default https://thenexus.news). Only override to a host you trust — your key is sent there.
